mbrInfo.formula: NONEMPTYTUPLE([OCF_Closing Balance],[OCF_Operating Cash Outflow],[OCF_Investing Cash Outflows],[OCF_Financing Cash Outflows],[OCF_Cash Outflows for Fixed Assets]) IIF(IsAncestor([OEP_Daily YearTotal],[Period].CurrentMember),(SUM ( Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepCurrYrPeriodRange} ), [OCF_Closing Balance]) + SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_NextYr]},{&OEP_RepNextYrPeriodRange}), [OCF_Closing Balance]))/(SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepCurrYrPeriodRange} ), [OCF_Operating Cash Outflow]+[OCF_Investing Cash Outflows]+[OCF_Financing Cash Outflows]+[OCF_Cash Outflows for Fixed Assets])+SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_NextYr]},{&OEP_RepNextYrPeriodRange }), [OCF_Operating Cash Outflow]+[OCF_Investing Cash Outflows]+[OCF_Financing Cash Outflows]+[OCF_Cash Outflows for Fixed Assets])),((SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicCurrYrPeriodRange} ), [OCF_Closing Balance]) + SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_NextYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicNextYrPeriodRange} ), [OCF_Closing Balance]))/(SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicCurrYrPeriodRange} ), [OCF_Operating Cash Outflow]+[OCF_Investing Cash Outflows]+[OCF_Financing Cash Outflows]+[OCF_Cash Outflows for Fixed Assets])+SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_NextYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicNextYrPeriodRange } ), [OCF_Operating Cash Outflow]+[OCF_Investing Cash Outflows]+[OCF_Financing Cash Outflows]+[OCF_Cash Outflows for Fixed Assets])))*30)

IIF(IsAncestor([OEP_Daily YearTotal],[Period].CurrentMember),(SUM ( Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepCurrYrPeriodRange} ), [OCF_Cash from Operating Activities]) + SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_NextYr]},{&OEP_RepNextYrPeriodRange}), [OCF_Cash from Operating Activities])) , (SUM ( Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicCurrYrPeriodRange} ), [OCF_Cash from Operating Activities]) + SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_NextYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicNextYrPeriodRange}), [OCF_Cash from Operating Activities])))

IIF(IsAncestor([OEP_Daily YearTotal],[Period].CurrentMember),(SUM ( Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepCurrYrPeriodRange} ), [OCF_Cash from Investing Activities]) + SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_NextYr]},{&OEP_RepNextYrPeriodRange}), [OCF_Cash from Investing Activities])),(SUM ( Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicCurrYrPeriodRange} ), [OCF_Cash from Investing Activities]) + SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_NextYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicNextYrPeriodRange}), [OCF_Cash from Investing Activities])))

IIF(IsAncestor([OEP_Daily YearTotal],[Period].CurrentMember), (SUM ( Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepCurrYrPeriodRange} ), [OCF_Cash from Financing Activities]) + SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_NextYr]},{&OEP_RepNextYrPeriodRange}), [OCF_Cash from Financing Activities])),(SUM ( Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicCurrYrPeriodRange} ), [OCF_Cash from Financing Activities]) + SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_NextYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicNextYrPeriodRange}), [OCF_Cash from Financing Activities])))

IIF(IsAncestor([OEP_Daily YearTotal],[Period].CurrentMember),(SUM ( Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepCurrYrPeriodRange} ), [OCF_Receivables Invoices]) + SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_NextYr]},{&OEP_RepNextYrPeriodRange}), [OCF_Receivables Invoices])),(SUM ( Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicCurrYrPeriodRange} ), [OCF_Receivables Invoices]) + SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_NextYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicNextYrPeriodRange}), [OCF_Receivables Invoices])))

IIF(IsAncestor([OEP_Daily YearTotal],[Period].CurrentMember),(SUM ( Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepCurrYrPeriodRange} ), [OCF_Payables Invoices]) + SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_NextYr]},{&OEP_RepNextYrPeriodRange}), [OCF_Payables Invoices])),(SUM ( Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicCurrYrPeriodRange} ), [OCF_Payables Invoices]) + SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_NextYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicNextYrPeriodRange}), [OCF_Payables Invoices])))

IIF(IS([Line Item].CurrentMember,[OCF_Customer Receipts] ),( ([OEP_Actual],[OCF_Smart Drivers],[OCF_Customer Receipts]) - (([OEP_Forecast],[OCF_Total Forecasted Cash],[OCF_Receivables Invoices]) + ([OEP_Forecast],[OCF_Total Forecasted Cash],[OCF_Customer Receipts])+ ([OEP_Forecast],[OCF_Total Forecasted Cash],[OCF_Receivables Overdue Invoices]) + ([OEP_Forecast],[OCF_Total Forecasted Cash],[OCF_Unapplied Receipts Offset]) )),IIF(IS([Line Item].CurrentMember,[OCF_Receivables Overdue Invoices] ),0,IIF(IS([Line Item].CurrentMember,[OCF_Receivables Invoices] ),0,IIF(IS([Line Item].CurrentMember,[OCF_Unapplied Receipts Offset] ),0,IIF(IS([Line Item].CurrentMember,[OCF_Supplier Payments] ),( ([OEP_Actual],[OCF_Smart Drivers],[OCF_Supplier Payments]) - (([OEP_Forecast],[OCF_Total Forecasted Cash],[OCF_Payables Invoices]) + ([OEP_Forecast],[OCF_Total Forecasted Cash],[OCF_Supplier Payments])+ ([OEP_Forecast],[OCF_Total Forecasted Cash],[OCF_Payables Overdue Invoices])+([OEP_Forecast],[OCF_Total Forecasted Cash],[OCF_Unapplied Prepayments Offset]) )),IIF(IS([Line Item].CurrentMember,[OCF_Payables Overdue Invoices] ),0,IIF(IS([Line Item].CurrentMember,[OCF_Payables Invoices] ),0,IIF(IS([Line Item].CurrentMember,[OCF_Unapplied Prepayments Offset] ),0,(([OEP_Actual],[OCF_Smart Drivers])- ([OEP_Forecast],[OCF_Total Forecasted Cash]))))))))))

NONEMPTYTUPLE([OCF_Customer Receipts],[OEP_Actual],[OCF_Smart Drivers],[OCF_Supplier Payments]) IIF(IsAncestor([OEP_Daily YearTotal],[Period].CurrentMember),(IIF(IS([Line Item].CurrentMember, [OCF_Customer Receipts]),((SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepDailyActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Actual], [OCF_Smart Drivers], [OCF_Customer Receipts])))),IIF(IS([Line Item].CurrentMember, [OCF_Supplier Payments]),((SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepDailyActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Actual], [OCF_Smart Drivers], [OCF_Supplier Payments])))), ((SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepDailyActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Actual], [OCF_Smart Drivers]))))))),(IIF(IS([Line Item].CurrentMember, [OCF_Customer Receipts]),((SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Actual], [OCF_Smart Drivers], [OCF_Customer Receipts])))),IIF(IS([Line Item].CurrentMember, [OCF_Supplier Payments]),((SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Actual], [OCF_Smart Drivers], [OCF_Supplier Payments])))),((SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Actual], [OCF_Smart Drivers]))))))))

NONEMPTYTUPLE([OCF_Customer Receipts],[OEP_Forecast],[OCF_Supplier Payments],[OCF_Total Forecasted Cash]) IIF(IsAncestor([OEP_Daily YearTotal],[Period].CurrentMember),(IIF(IS([Line Item].CurrentMember, [OCF_Customer Receipts]), (SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepDailyActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Receivables Invoices])) +SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepDailyActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Customer Receipts])) +SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepDailyActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Receivables Overdue Invoices])) +SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepDailyActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Unapplied Receipts Offset]))), IIF(IS([Line Item].CurrentMember, [OCF_Supplier Payments]), (SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepDailyActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Payables Invoices])) +SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepDailyActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Supplier Payments])) +SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepDailyActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Payables Overdue Invoices]))),((SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepDailyActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash]))))))),(IIF(IS([Line Item].CurrentMember, [OCF_Customer Receipts]), (SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Receivables Invoices])) +SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Customer Receipts])) +SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Receivables Overdue Invoices])) +SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Unapplied Receipts Offset]))), IIF(IS([Line Item].CurrentMember, [OCF_Supplier Payments]), (SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Payables Invoices])) +SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Supplier Payments])) +SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Payables Overdue Invoices]))+SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Unapplied Prepayments Offset]))),((SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash]))))))))

NONEMPTYTUPLE([OCF_Customer Receipts],[OEP_Actual],[OCF_Smart Drivers],[OCF_Supplier Payments]) IIF(IsAncestor([OEP_Daily YearTotal],[Period].CurrentMember),(IIF(IS([Line Item].CurrentMember, [OCF_Customer Receipts]),((SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepDailyActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Actual], [OCF_Smart Drivers], [OCF_Customer Receipts])))- (SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepDailyActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Unapplied Receipts Offset])))), IIF(IS([Line Item].CurrentMember, [OCF_Supplier (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepDailyActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Payables Invoices])) +SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepDailyActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Supplier Payments])) +SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepDailyActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Payables Overdue Invoices])))), ((SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepDailyActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Actual], [OCF_Smart Drivers]))) -(SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepDailyActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash]))))))),(IIF(IS([Line Item].CurrentMember, [OCF_Customer Receipts]),((SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Actual], [OCF_Smart Drivers], [OCF_Customer Receipts])))- (SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Receivables Invoices])) +SUM Payments]), ((SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Actual], [OCF_Smart Drivers], [OCF_Supplier Payments])))- ( SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Payables Invoices])) +SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash], [OCF_Unapplied Prepayments Offset])))),((SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Actual], [OCF_Smart Drivers]))) -(SUM (Crossjoin({[&OEP_CurrYr]},{&OEP_RepPeriodicActualYrPeriodRange}),([OEP_Forecast], [OCF_Total Forecasted Cash]))))))))
